title: Super Mod
description: Time only moves when you move (Superhot)
body:
# SuperMod

SuperMod adds Superhot mechanics and scriptable lua computers to minecraft.

You can try out this mod and so many more live on the [Modfest 1.21](https://modfest.net/1.21) server right now

![Arrows fly past the player in slow motion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AwxkDzPI/images/3a2894586582b58e1828a1ed4cd2945dfe41ada0.webp)

Time only moves when you move

## Basic Setup
1. Create an [Area Lib](./area_lib) area using `/area create <id> <from> <to>`
2. Bind the area to a new super profile using `/super profile create <id>`
3. (Optional) Change some settings on the profile
4. Run `/super profile activate <id>`

## Puters
This mod also adds completely moddable computers running lua. They can be used to code minigames,
start a super session and more

![A player holding a computer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AwxkDzPI/images/66228f380a4282aed60e28e018b1e5ea65d1e432.png)

Computers come with a basic api to continously run code every tick, retrieve information about the game and more. The docs can be found [here](https://github.com/Tomate0613/super-mod)

![A simple lua script](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AwxkDzPI/images/78f66c1e7c36bdb32813062af1f4415fd3b656e5_350.webp)
